name: research-foundation
description: Research foundation plugin: philosophy-level process skills (grounding / debugging / brainstorming / grilling / red-teaming / executing-plans / handoff / writing-skills) plus a one-page standing principles doc.

interface.shortDescription: Philosophy-level process skills for research work
interface.longDescription: Grounding before opinions, root-cause debugging via tight feedback loops, brainstorming before grilling, strict plan execution, session handoff, and skill-authoring discipline — principles, not engineering SOPs.
defaultPrompt: Use Research Foundation to help me scope a new research question.
Use Research Foundation to turn my agreed research plan into a verified execution checklist.
Use Research Foundation to review a proposed skill before I add it to this plugin.
